narrative:
Grand Twp. township has 261 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.7 percentage points.
